name: Attention Mechanism
summary: A mechanism that allows neural networks to selectively focus on relevant parts of the input when producing each element of the output. Instead of compressing an entire input sequence into a fixed-length vector, attention computes a weighted sum over all input positions, with weights determined by learned compatibility functions. Self-attention (attending within a single sequence) is the core operation of the Transformer architecture and the foundation of all modern LLMs.
query_hooks: Why is attention important in AI?
How do language models understand context?
